subject: [PATCH v2 09/14] fuse: rearrange io-uring iovec and ent allocation logic

2026-04-02.patch_summary: This patch rearranges the allocation logic in the fuse_uring code to make it easier to review subsequent commits related to buffer rings. The function fuse_uring_get_iovec_from_sqe is moved to an earlier location in the file, and its allocation logic is moved to the beginning of the fuse_uring_create_ring_ent function. This change does not affect the existing logic but simplifies the code for future modifications.
